What is the TKT: Young Learners Module?

The Young Learners (YL) module is a specific test from the Cambridge Teaching Knowledge Test (TKT) suite. It's designed for teachers of English to young learners. This course prepares you for every aspect of it.

It focuses on the core areas of teaching children:

  • Child development & learning strategies
  • Effective classroom management for YL
  • Age-appropriate teaching methodologies
  • Comprehensive Cambridge exam preparation

This course is specially designed for...

English teachers who work with children

Teachers seeking international certification

Professionals improving classroom management

Teachers seeking methodology confidence

Cambridge TKT YL candidates

Frequently Asked Questions

Who is this course for?

This course is for English teachers who work with children (6-12 years old) and want to gain confidence, learn new methodologies, and/or prepare for the Cambridge TKT: Young Learners international certification.

How long will I have access to the course?

You will have access to all recorded lessons and materials for one full year from the date of purchase, allowing you to learn at your own pace and revisit content as needed.

Are the live sessions mandatory?

While highly recommended for the interactive experience, the live mentoring sessions are not mandatory. They will be recorded and made available for you to watch later if you cannot attend live.

Do I need any specific materials for the course?

No, all necessary materials, including PDFs, guides, and activity sheets, will be provided within the course platform. You just need a stable internet connection.

Ready to take your Young Learners teaching to the next level?
